name: Satellogic Inc.
summary: PART I Company Overview Satellogics mission is to democratize access to geospatial data through its information platform of high-resolution images to help solve the worlds most pressing problems including climate change, energy supply, and food security. Using its patented Earth imaging technology, Satellogic seeks to unlock the power of EO to deliver high-quality, planetary insights at unparalleled value.
